decisions: Turn 1: Executed preflight-authorized ladder Step 0 cookie probe first; PASS unlocked Step 1. Step 1 chose VOD 11688000 (Winter Olympics) over the 'talk' category (smallest talk VOD 5713s < 1800s usable with margin) or 'music' (27452s too long to fully download in-turn) as the cleanest non-game axis VOD on the current channel.
Turn 1: For Step 2 the offset was 1800s because any offset >= 1800s breaks t=0 equivalence; 1800 exactly produces a clean [1800, 3600) window that is a non-overlapping sibling of W1's [0, 1800).

Turn 1: Both new cells were measured with empty chat_log because 11688000 has no chat history collected yet and 12702452's existing chat_log only covers 0-1799s (outside the offset window). This creates a no-chat variant that is documented but not a blocker.

Turn 1: Data-integrity finding recorded: VOD 12702452's Chzzk category is Nintendo Switch life-simulation game, not talk. A4 Turn 5's 'talk' genre label was content-judgement, not platform metadata. The next session must choose which labeling schema governs axis_coverage_ok.

Turn 2: Peer verification accepted all five checkpoints. For future A4 promotion accounting, use a two-field schema: platform_category as the authoritative axis label and content_judgement as an optional annotation. Both W5 chat acquisition and W4 re-measurement belong in a separate acquisition/measurement follow-up session, not the smoke session.
meta_improvements: Pre-acquisition channel enumeration should be added to the preflight checklist so the next preflight can pick the best-coverage non-duplicate VOD before the execute session opens. This session did the enumeration in-turn, which worked but leaves preflight blind to actual candidate set.
Chzzk category should be recorded at acquisition time as a first-class cell attribute separate from content-judgement genre. A4 conflated them, which produced the W1/W2/W3 'talk' misclassification.

Chat-log coverage should be an explicit cell-level attribute (full / partial / none) so future promotion rules can distinguish chat-fed measurements from no-chat variants instead of silently pooling them.

Smoke should stay purely end-to-end. Measurement rescue work such as W5 chat acquisition and W4 retry protocol correction should not be bundled into the smoke session because it muddies the pass/fail surface.
